name: Kielbasa 5
recipeIngredient: 1 large green pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all ingredients in a casserole dish with a lid.
3. Bake for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from the oven and stir again.
5. Return to the oven and bake for another hour.
6. Serve!
